...I've always respected her but, I once again realized
just how amazing of a person Rino nee-san is.
Her ability to take care of various troubles beforehand even when unrelated to her isn't

something just anyone can imitate, so it's understandable for everyone to rely on her so 
much.
Are there any people she herself can rely upon at all?
There's probably not much I can do, but I hoped that I could serve as at least
some emotional support for such a brilliant and hardworking person.

Apparently, my father's really good at his job, and when it
comes to putting out fires, he's second to none, to the point that both
his superiors and subordinates sing his praises alike.

mean a single thing in relation to how they are with their family.
